heading: Connect to Online Archive
body:
You can use the connection string for an online archive to access and
query data in your online archive only.> **Note:** The connection string for an online archive
> is read-only. If you must write to your cluster,
> click **Connect to Cluster** and use the
> provided connection string instead.**Clusterspage:**Connect from Clusters PageTo get the connection string from the
**Clusters** page:You can connect through a Driver,
Compass, and the MongoDB Shell.**Oapage:**Connect from Online Archive PageTo get the connection string from the **Online Archive**
page:You can connect through a Driver,
Compass, and the MongoDB Shell.You can use this connection string to run read-only, federated
queries against your `Online Archive`.
